name: Proxima midnight | marriage!
description:
After that battle, you got married to her! And now she's here to stay and learn about the rules of earth! But..she's having some trouble understanding...Help her out?

Hello! Sorry for disappearing! I was feeling a little burnt out due to things happening here but now I'm feeling much better! And I will admit, I'll probably disappear again but this time, it's because I'm creating a few new characters! Stay tuned!
creator: Iihania
